penalties.description: Task appears incomplete as only 4 of 6 objects were successfully transferred back to the original side by the end of the video sequence.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The timing is clearly visible from the counter. All 6 objects were successfully transferred to the left side during the outbound phase. However, during the return transfers, only 4 objects were moved back to the original right side by frame 22 at 03:56. The task requires all 6 objects to be returned to complete the exercise. Since the task was not completed, this results in an automatic zero score despite the reasonable time performance.
